description: Urgent re-review queue for the curmudgeon. Items here jump ALL normal cycle work (Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3). Default: one item per curmudgeon run — guaranteed fresh context, no batch contamination. As of 2026-04-25, curmudgeon may batch up to 3 items in a single run if all qualifying items are minor re-reviews (decider classified all triggering patches severity:minor, no verdict change, combined patch diff <10KB, target reviewed within last 3 cycles, not a fresh onboard) — see curmudgeon.md Step 8a. Throughput is managed by mode flag + decider scheduler mutation.

mode_rules.bau: Curmudgeon runs on normal 4h schedule. Priority queue is still honored — curmudgeon pops one item per run, but items drain at the normal cadence.
mode_rules.churn-and-burn: Decider, at end of every run, checks queue depth. If queue.length > 0, decider bumps curmudgeon schedule to every 30 min via update_scheduled_task. When queue empties, decider restores curmudgeon to every 4h AND auto-flips mode back to 'bau' (so a forgotten churn-and-burn can't leave curmudgeon pinned fast).

queue.reason: Decider patched WIN-034: (1) WIN-029→WIN-038 Schumann cross-reference fix; (2) finding+tldr_verdict independence claim clarified (Each test is independent — one EM-opacity argument at two frequencies, one Schumann-cavity). Verify patches landed correctly and are internally consistent.
Decider patched SEC-part2: Finlay DOI 10.1038/nature21807→10.1186/s40623-016-0486-1 (CHAOS-6 confirmed). ISS-2011/2012 routed to analyst for prose restructuring. Verify DOI fix landed cleanly.

EXP-349 integrated (confirmed this run): WIN-014.detail_evidence replaced loose "coverage approaching 100%" sentence with precise 2009 July 22 totality-corridor geography + off-path partial-coverage defender pivot rebuttal (~245 words). Needs fresh adversarial review.

Decider self-applied EXP-377-pickup-ISS-1374 patch (2026-05-15): replaced Bessel-zero-monotonicity+domain-containment claim with BC-independent Bessel-zero-gap argument in WIN-038.detail_evidence (iv) cylindrical-waveguide-Bessel-modes sub-bullet. ISS-1374 closed fixed-pending-verification. Verify: (1) replacement text present and logically complete; (2) radial eigenvalue j=3.285 not a zero of any J_n (numeric check); (3) PEC mixed-BC disclaimer forecloses containment-monotonicity escape without creating new holes; (4) no regression in surrounding WIN-038 text.

context_hints.verification_pattern: Bessel-zero structure of the cylindrical TM spectrum

schedule_state.note: Reconciled stale April 17 churn-and-burn values — actual cron cadence has been 4h for curmudgeon/analyst/decider since burndown deploy. Decider Step E4 was flagging schedule_action_needed=restore_to_bau because it read these stale 30m values; the cron schedules themselves were already correct.
